note: Flat, paved, fully step-free park with ramped access throughout; The Bean sits on smooth level ground. Accessible toilets nearby. Easy and free.
Fully accessible with lifts to all levels, step-free entrances, loaner wheelchairs and accessible toilets. Flat galleries. One of the easiest big museums.
A flat, continuous, step-free paved path along the river with ramped/elevator access from street level; great for strollers and wheelchairs.
Lifts to the 103rd-floor deck; the deck is accessible though the glass 'Ledge' boxes have a small lip. Very busy; book timed entry.
Flat, fully accessible pier with ramps, lifts and step-free attractions including an accessible Ferris wheel gondola; easy and family-friendly.
An 18-mile flat, paved lakeshore path; entirely step-free and smooth, ideal for wheeling and strolling with lake views.
Fully accessible with lifts, ramps at the entrance, loaner wheelchairs and step-free galleries. Large but level.
Lift to the 94th-floor observation deck which is accessible; the tilting 'Tilt' feature is not, but views are step-free. Book ahead.
Wide, flat, smooth sidewalks the length of the shopping avenue; fully step-free and easy though busy.
A large flat glasshouse with step-free paved paths throughout and free entry; easy and lovely, a little out from downtown.
The historic ballpark has accessible seating and entrances but the century-old structure has ramps, tight concourses and some stairs to certain areas. Accessible seats need advance booking.
